role_title: Associate Manager, Dasher & Logistics Strategy & Operations, Logistics Operations

level_signals: Title is Associate Manager, not Manager
Comp range $105,400–$155,000 base, consistent with mid-senior IC at DoorDash

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 4-6 years of experience in consulting, strategy, financial services, operations, technology, startups or related experience
You are able to analyze and synthesize data, make informed decisions and balance quantitative measurement with an empathetic, intuition-based mindset. You can crunch data in SQL/Excel independently.
You love thinking about problems from a first principles approach, and you aren't afraid to take action and try new things in order to create the future.
You are able to communicate complex topics in a clear, concise, and thorough way to stakeholders at all levels of the organization.
You focus on getting stuff done and aren't afraid to get into the details. No job is beneath you and you lead from the front and with optimism.
You're comfortable with ambiguity and the dynamic nature of operations which may require working weekends and holidays
You have a Bachelor's degree in a related field

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Master's Degree preferred but not required.

scope.surface: Dasher & Logistics Operations — dasher pay, efficiency, supply & demand, cost & quality, order batching
scope.business_model: marketplace / logistics platform (B2C and B2B via merchant partnerships)
core_responsibilities: Build analysis to create data-driven decisions to improve the experience for Users
Operate at the lowest level of detail to become an expert of this problem space
Develop strategies and act on them
Work closely with cross-functional teams to drive impact for DoorDash
Improve dasher pay and efficiency by understanding what's happening on the ground, developing and testing hypotheses, and scaling impact

green_flags: Comprehensive benefits package described in detail (401k, parental leave, wellness, etc.)
Clear reporting structure (reports to a Manager on Dasher & Logistics team)
Specific metrics and problem space articulated (delivery times, cost per order, dasher compensation)
Position fill date disclosed (6/14/2026), signaling active and time-bound search
Cross-functional exposure to Product, Engineering, and Analytics
red_flags: Work location type not specified in JD body — remote, hybrid, or onsite eligibility is unclear
Role may require working weekends and holidays per JD, which could affect work-life balance
Visa sponsorship not addressed in the JD

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Associate Manager', reporting structure, comp range, and years of experience)
scope.business_model (inferred from company description and product context)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (partially stated in About the Team section; treated as inferred for scope field)
ambiguities: Work location is not specified anywhere in the JD body — no mention of remote, hybrid, or onsite; left as 'unclear'
The pay range is described as 'national base pay range... including Illinois and Colorado' suggesting localized adjustment, but no city-specific ranges are listed for this role
